column1: You ____ not buy the child everything he wants.
You ____ not do everything by yourself. You can ask for help.
______ I cook? We can go to the restaurant.
You ______ go at the meeting. You have nothing to do there.
Does Sarah _________ go to her mum’s place tomorrow?
It’s Sunday tomorrow. I … get up early.
Sally ______ work more because she missed some lessons.
The baby ________ be in bed, because it is very late.
